whatsappPrefill.intro: Hi, I want to source a product from China.

hero.title: Source Wholesale Products from China with AI
hero.subtitle: Upload a product photo, paste a link, or describe what you need. Our AI creates a sourcing request — then our team verifies factories, compares prices, checks quality, and arranges shipping.
hero.imageAlt: China logistics warehouse and export containers

problem.title: Buying from China is not the problem. Buying from the wrong people is.
items: Fake factories
Thousands of trading companies pose as manufacturers on Alibaba.
Price changes after deposit
The quoted price and the invoiced price are rarely the same.
Lost in translation
Key product terms and quality standards get lost without someone on the ground.
Goods fail on arrival
Products look correct in photos. The problems show up after customs.
Hidden costs
Shipping, duties, inspection, and packaging costs are rarely included in the first quote.
No production follow-up
Orders disappear into production with no updates until shipment.

process.title: 8 steps. Full transparency.
items: Send us product details
Share product specs, photos, quantity, target price, and destination.
We search verified factories
We compare suppliers that can actually produce and export.
Supplier comparison delivered to you
You receive options with pricing, terms, and risks clearly shown.
Factory verification
We check license, capacity, location, and credibility before payment.
Sample arrangement
We coordinate samples, packaging, and required changes.
Production follow-up
We track production milestones and supplier updates.
Pre-shipment inspection
We inspect product, carton, labeling, and order consistency.
Shipping to your country
We arrange freight, customs documents, and delivery handoff.

categories.title: We source across high-demand B2B categories.

quality.title: Inspection happens before the shipment leaves China.
stages: We lock product requirements before supplier selection.
We confirm materials, color, packaging, and finish.
We follow status while the order is being produced.
You see what is ready before shipment.
We verify export marks and packaging details.

regional.title: We know the routes that most sourcing agents don't.
regional.text: Most sourcing companies focus on US and EU buyers. We are built for the Azerbaijan, Turkey, Russia, CIS, and Middle East trade corridors.
regional.mapLabel: Animated trade routes from Guangzhou to regional destinations

items.title: Retail packaging supplier replaced before deposit
Factory verification avoided a false manufacturer
Private label sample corrected before production

whyUs.title: Built for importers who need control, not guesswork.
whyUs.text: We work between your commercial goals and the factory floor: sourcing, negotiation, verification, inspection, and shipping are handled as one connected process.

items.question: Can you find a factory for any product?
items.answer: We work across most legal B2B product categories and will tell you quickly if a product is outside our scope.

items.question: Do I pay before you search?
items.answer: You can start with a quote request. Paid work begins only after scope is agreed.

items.question: Can you inspect goods before shipping?
items.answer: Yes. We can arrange pre-shipment inspection with photo and video reporting.

items.question: Do you support OEM packaging?
items.answer: Yes. We coordinate logo, cartons, labels, inserts, and supplier requirements.

items.question: Can you ship to Azerbaijan and Turkey?
items.answer: Yes. These trade corridors are core markets for us.

items.question: Do you work with small quantities?
items.answer: We can support samples and trial orders when factories accept the quantity.

items.question: Can I use my own supplier?
items.answer: Yes. We can verify, inspect, consolidate, or ship from your existing supplier.

items.question: How fast do you reply?
items.answer: We reply within four business hours for quote requests.

items.question: Do you handle customs?
items.answer: We coordinate export documents and local import partners depending on destination.

final.title: Send us your product. We reply within 4 hours.
final.text: Tell us the product, quantity, and destination. We will send you a sourcing plan with supplier options within one business day. No payment required.
final.note: No obligation. No payment to start.

home.value: We connect you to the right factory at the right price.

about.name: Sarkhan Huseynov
about.intro: Silk Road was built for importers who need a direct way to buy from China without losing control of price, quality, or delivery.
story: International trade becomes expensive when small details are handled late.
The work is practical: find the right factory, confirm the real cost, protect the order, and deliver it cleanly.
values: Clear terms, clear updates, no hidden movement.
Fast supplier checks without careless shortcuts.
Negotiation focused on total landed cost.
